D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

sRGB Gamma Encoding

slide the linear value and watch the sRGB transfer curve bend through its linear toe and 2.4 power

Encoding light non-linearly packs more code values into the dark tones the eye is sensitive to. sRGB splices a tiny linear segment onto a 2.4 power law.

Slide the linear input and read the encoded output on the curve. Toggle the plain gamma-2.2 comparison and watch the two diverge near black, where sRGB's linear toe tames the otherwise infinite slope.
